chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.33 of 2018 Collector of Customs & Central Excise Versus M/s Industrial Chemicals (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as appellant’s counsel has not supplied the copies or paid the process fee, hence notices could not be issued. Dated: 22.04.2024 None present. -.-.- On 10.01.2023 notices were ordered subject to maintainability however it seems that the orders have not been complied. For the first time it was fixed on 02.10.2023 followed by its fixation for non- prosecution on 17.01.2024 when as an indulgence a week’s time was granted. Today yet again office has fixed it for non-prosecution and no one is present on behalf of the appellant. There is no intimation either. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
